meta.title: Pieraksts — Beauty bookings in Riga, without calls or DMs
meta.description: Pieraksts helps clients find real salon availability and helps salon owners keep services, specialists, and bookings in one calm schedule.
meta.tagline: Beauty bookings in Riga, without calls or DMs
meta.keywords: salon booking Riga, beauty appointments, hair salon Riga, book beauty online, salon scheduling, beauty bookings Latvia, Pieraksts

hero.headline: Beauty bookings in Riga, without calls or DMs
hero.subhead: As simple and fast as ordering a ride: no calls, no DMs, real availability. Discover salons, pick a time, and confirm in a few taps.
hero.note: Free to join during launch · Pay your salon directly, at the salon

showcase.title: Discovery, booking, and your day — in one calm app
showcase.body: No calls, no DMs. Clients find real availability and book in a few taps; salon owners keep every booking in one schedule.

client.title: Find a salon and book in minutes
client.description: Discover salons near you, see real availability, and keep your routine in one place.
points: Discover salons across Riga by service
See real availability — no back-and-forth messages
Book a visit and manage upcoming bookings
Keep your favourite salons one tap away

owner.title: Your services, specialists, and bookings in one calm schedule
owner.description: Set up your salon once, then manage your day without the phone glued to your hand.
points: Set up your salon profile, services, and working hours
Add your specialists and what each one offers
Manage incoming bookings and add manual bookings
Block time off so your schedule always tells the truth

flow.title: Real availability, picked in seconds
flow.description: No calls, no DMs — clients see open slots for a specialist and confirm.

steps.title: Discover
steps.body: Browse salons in Riga by the service you want, from a haircut to a manicure.

steps.title: Choose a time
steps.body: See real availability for a specialist and pick a slot that actually works.

steps.title: Confirm
steps.body: Book in a few taps. Your upcoming bookings stay in one place.
